creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Your patch does not apply for me:
error: patch failed: sysutils/tree/Makefile:1
error: sysutils/tree/Makefile: patch does not apply
error: sysutils/tree/files/patch-Makefile: does not exist in index
Patch failed at 0001 Upgrade to version 2.0.2

Makefile was updated and files/patch-Makefile was removed in https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=7fbb727e11bec00da6a84653a0bea0b02d9b9d4e

Please rebase against the current tree and re-submit the patch.
